generated_oml:
instance BuildingEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational sensor data including post-occupancy sensor data for monitoring environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational sensor data for environmental conditions transmitted from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE, UnrealEngine5
]

instance BuildingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) modeled in BIM for control logic implementation"
]

instance BuildingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) modeled in BIM for control logic implementation"
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) methodologies"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with semantic data for BCS components (sensors, actuators, controllers), including geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools
]

instance DeploymentProcessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment process involving BIM validation, automated extraction of metadata, model-to-model transformations, and generation of runtime artifacts using Design Science Research methodology evolution via standardized extension points for service integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance BCSSemanticData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Semantic data for BCS components (sensors, actuators, controllers), including geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools
]

instance HonoDittoMiddlewareMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware metadata for Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building systems for optimization"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
]

instance Building : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building in the AECO domain, specifically demonstrated in a Living Lab case study as a cyber-physical asset for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization"
    base:contains BuildingEnvironmentalSensor, BuildingActuator, BuildingController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to actuators/controllers in the physical BCS through Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for operational monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular service extensions for scalability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [

]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces and modular architecture to enable interoperability with external information systems and services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with AECO-specific standards, particularly Building Information Modeling (BIM), and standardized integration mechanisms for interoperability."
